purpose: Human-readable v0.1 tool catalog. This is documentation, not an execution engine.

categories.description: Read, list, and write project files under explicit workspace rules.
Run PowerShell commands for validation, tests, and local automation.
Inspect repository state and prepare changes. Push/reset/clean require explicit approval.
Verify local web apps and visual/frontend behavior when available.
Look up current external information when necessary.
Create or inspect document artifacts when explicitly requested.
Create, analyze, or edit spreadsheet artifacts when requested.
Create or edit slide decks when requested.
Read or send email only when the user explicitly asks.
Read or modify Drive/Docs/Sheets/Slides only when the user explicitly asks.
Search flights only when the user explicitly asks.
